channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 6th May
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole approx 1000x600x40mm number 1 plus x3 NSD (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other problem, 6th May
item.description:
NWD Give and take PLEASE REMOVE SIGN FRAME AND SANDBAG A BROKEN SIGN APPROX 1500X600MM FROM SIDE OF BUILDING (Debris/Obstruction in CW)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Kerbs and Channels problem, 6th May
item.description:
Road closure 28 day please replace x1 broken missing kerb stone 600x 100 x100mm semi round kerb stone cutting my be required stats required (CW Edge Kerbing & Channels)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cracked and loose pavement flag stone, 6th May
item.description:
The pavement stones near to the lamp light outside numbers 10 and 12 Pittville Lawn

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Pittville Lawn, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree is damaged problem, 6th May
item.description:
Customer reporting potentially dead silver birch tree, approx 40-50 feet tall. Has noticed what appears to be dead twigs falling and concerned that given the height of the tree, larger branches/boughs may fall during high winds. Requesting check made.
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 6th May
item.description:

item.title: Refusal to maintain private park by Gateway, 6th May
item.description:
Park at the corner of New Barn Avenue and New Barn Close, Prestbury. GL52 3LL. Gateway for years now neglect this park, allowing it to overgrow with weeds and elders which looks awful, blocks public footpaths and pollutes surrounding gardens with weed seeds. Dead trees are left on display. This problem was reported last year and it continues the same. There must be a contract, please legally enforce it. Allowing this indefinitely is unacceptable. Please act, thank you very much.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 42-50, Ridge Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Soil and debris build up on car parks nurturing weeds, 6th May
item.description:
Corner of New Barn Avenue and New Barn Close in Prestbury, Cheltenham, GL52 3LL. Yesterday the weeds were mowed down, but if the soil and debris remains on the surface, the weeds will continue growing. The soil build up needs removing from the car park, please. Easier to once remove, than cultivate and continue mowing. Thank you.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, New Barn Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Area under bridge is VERY degraded and dangerous, 6th May
item.description:
Under the railway bridge there are multiple areas which need attention...VERY dangerous for cyclists
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects -CW6 Potholes problem, 6th May
item.description:
Road closure 28 day carriage way pothole 500x500x50mm number 1 (CW6 Pothole)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unnecessary motorway barrier in residential area blocking public footpaths, 6th May
item.description:
Park at corner of New Barn Avenue and New Barn Close in Prestbury, GL52 3LL. It was put up more than 20 years ago to stop joyriders. But the land was now built on and the barrier looks awful and stops access to public footpaths. Elderly people are hurting themselves trying to step over. It attracts dumping of rubbish. Kindly, please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, New Barn Close, Lynworth, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: TMC - Defects - Footways Slabs problem, 6th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway closure please lift and relay x1 rocking sunken 500x300x20mm part slab (FW Rocking/Unstable Slab)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 6th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway aburt level difference footway closure 400x150x18mm concrete fillet (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole near entrance of Safran, 6th May
item.description:
Headed to traffic lights this morning hit this pothole near entrance to safran. Heard a large clunk on nearside, my partner thinks shock absorber has gone on car. Needs looking at
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Down Hatherley Lane, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Other FW6 Surface problem, 6th May
item.description:
Give and take 28 days footway aburt level difference footway closure 700x300x20mm stats required (FW6 Abrupt Level Differences)
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Middle of the road, 5th May
item.description:
I live at 228 Brooklyn Road, Cheltenham in the middle of the road outside my property are two large holes in the road where the road has broken down. This is putting cyclists and motorcyclists at risk of being thrown off and putting cars at risk of damage. My neighbour is 93 and walked across the road and nearly tripped and fell due to the roads condition.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 229, Brooklyn Road, Wymans Brook, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bus Shelter & Timetable, 5th May
item.description:
Hello Just sharing because I’ve seen him post it on X. I know one of the stops have been done with the new L not sure on the other side

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Coronation Square, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
